<!-- stub: add matching Object ID / Figure ID to workbook when data is ready -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-cardiovasdz-hospi-aar
#| fig-cap: 'Cardiovasdz Hospi Aar'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization of Cardiovasdz Hospi Aar.'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-cardiovasdz-hospi-aar", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
